description: chdservices.gov.in is the Chandigarh Administration's e-District / e-Services portal for citizens to access government services and track applications. Publicly discoverable pages point to web forms and service listings, not developer-oriented programmatic integration interfaces.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for chdservices.gov.in beyond a citizen-facing e-District web portal; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, MCP servers, or CLIs could be confirmed.
